texto: The Government's going to pass a bill regarding schools. Well I never. Interfering gang they are, as if a parent doesn't know what's best for her own child. I don't know, I don't know! We won't be able to call our children our own just now.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a James Hanley: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “The Government's going to pass a bill regarding schools. Well I never. Interfering gang they are,…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, government, going pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
